svg.text: DetLog WAL benchmark — durable and nondurable policies kept distinct
UNSAFE / NONDURABLE APPEND ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS: unsafe-no-flush append throughput does not measure crash-safe commits

P1: source=raw-includes-nondurable.jsonl.gz | os=windows | compiler=gcc 11.3.0 | C++=202002 | hw_threads=20 | commit=25638317094f5a451d7715e301b375e37d87bbb6 | flags=g++ 11.3.0 -std=c++20 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wconversion -Wsign-conversion -Wshadowraw-includes-nondurable.jsonl.gz
Append throughput (trial means with min–max whiskers; final unsafe flush excluded)
